subject: Simisage, a bipedal green monkey Pokemon with a leaf-topped head and barbed tail
description: A bipedal monkey creature stands upright in a lush green environment, its body primarily green with a jagged leaf-shaped growth on top of its head and a long spined or barbed tail curling behind it. Its posture suggests readiness or mild aggression — weight shifted, arms loosely out. The surrounding foliage is dense and tropical, with yellow orb-like fruit or seed pods visible nearby. The creature's expression carries an ill-tempered quality consistent with its flavor text. The overall palette is saturated green and yellow.
foreground: green bipedal monkey creature with leaf head-growth and spined tail
background: dense tropical foliage with yellow fruit
emotion: ill-tempered, ready to lash out, tense body language
